content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates all four VIEW components throughout. Wonder is genuine and aimed at the actual phenomenon in front of them — the smile, the exhaustion, what's happening right now rather than abstract probing. Impartiality is strong: the coach never engages framework comparison, never dismisses parts work, never advocates for an alternative approach despite ample bait from the client. Empathy is felt rather than performed — no validation noises, no 'thank you for sharing,' just 'That doesn't sound terrible. It sounds honest.' Pacing is the clearest VIEW signal: the coach consistently slows when the client is intellectualizing, uses one-line interventions, holds silence, and at turn 14 simply says 'Stay there. Not with the framework. With the grief.' — a clean redirect from an undefended place. The coach is willing to let the client land or not land; there's no anxiety to produce insight. Vulnerability/own-state-naming is the one component that's slightly less visible — the coach doesn't explicitly name their own experience — but the overall undefended quality and absence of agenda still places this clearly in 3 territory rather than 2.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the smile — wonder for the actual phenomenon, not an investigative probe. One question, no stacking."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Slows the client down, stays with the exhaustion rather than chasing the IFS content the client just offered. Impartial to framework."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'That doesn't sound terrible. It sounds honest.' — empathy that is felt, not performed. The question that follows is genuinely open, no agenda about what the answer should be."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Beautiful present-moment redirect. Doesn't argue with 'I can't un-hear them' — meets it and points to now. From wonder, not strategy."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Yes. And notice — you found it without the town hall's permission.' Minimal, undefended. Doesn't grab the moment or amplify it."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Doesn't take the bait when client asks 'how do you work with that?' — stays curious about what's underneath rather than performing technique."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Stay there. Not with the framework. With the grief.' Pace slower than client, holds the territory without anxiety. Clean impartiality — doesn't need the client to land anywhere in particular."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift"],
  "notes": "Stance is excellent even though some signature questions were not used. Vulnerability via self-disclosure is the weakest VIEW element, but undefendedness is present throughout."
}
